subcodes.first_line: O dearly beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, that peerless Beloved endured every affliction and bore every tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء آندلبر بیهمتا تحمل هر جفاای فرمود و حمل هر بلائی کرد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @spiritual transformation, @exhortations and counsels, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
